title: Input schema of the Hugging Face Trending Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Hugging Face trending pages to scrape.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape.

trendingPeriod.title: Trending Period
trendingPeriod.description: Time period for trending data (daily, weekly, monthly).

includeDetails.title: Include Detailed Information
includeDetails.description: Scrape detailed info for each model/dataset (slower but more data).

extractMetrics.title: Extract Performance Metrics
extractMetrics.description: Extract likes, downloads, and other metrics.
